Podcast Plug: Interview with Roshan Cariappa from Bharatvaarta

# Podcast Plug: Interview with Roshan Cariappa from Bharatvaarta

I had a chance to go on the Bharatvaarta podcast recently to discuss all things Hindu diaspora, including some of the ideas I’ve been sharing here on Frontier Dharma. Please do listen and share. It was a great conversation!
